title: Adult Basic Education Level 2
catalogDescription: Provides instruction in basic reading, writing, critical thinking, and math to help students acquire fundamental academic, career and adult life skills. This is a pass/no credit course. Prerequisite: Instructor's permission and appropriate CASAS score.
